news.headline: Data breach at The Grove at Valhalla Rehabilitation and Nursing Center in Valhalla, NY on Sept. 19, 2024, affecting personal information.
news.summary: In Valhalla, New York, on February 20, 2025, HHH Acquisition LLC, operating as The Grove at Valhalla Rehabilitation and Nursing Center, discovered a data security breach around September 19, 2024, involving a third-party vendor. This incident potentially exposed the personal information of a certain number of individuals.

news.headline: Austin's spring 2025 event lineup includes ATX Open, SXSW, MotoGP, Hot Luck Festival. Basketball fans anticipate I-35 Series.
news.summary: Austin, Texas is gearing up for a packed spring schedule in 2025 with several high-profile events on the horizon. Among the highlights are the ATX Open, SXSW, MotoGP, and Hot Luck Festival. The city will be bustling with activity as locals and tourists alike partake in these popular events. The spring lineup promises something for everyone, from sports enthusiasts eagerly anticipating the I-35 Series featuring the San Antonio Spurs to music lovers flocking to SXSW. With a diverse array of events on offer, Austin is set to be the place to be this spring.

news.headline: Danaher appoints Charles Lamanna to its Board of Directors and Science & Technology Committee - Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Today, on February 20, 2025, Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) made public the appointment of Charles Lamanna to its Board of Directors and the Science & Technology Committee. Lamanna, the current Corporate Vice President, Business & Industry Copilot, will now have a significant role within the company. This decision reflects Danaher Corporation's ongoing commitment to enhancing its board leadership.

Tidewater to release Q4 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025, with earnings call on Feb 28, 2025 at 8:00 am Central Time. President to discuss the company's performance.

The announcement will be followed by an earnings conference call on February 28, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time. President and CEO, Quintin Kneen, will lead the discussion regarding the company's performance during the mentioned periods.

news.headline: Yext (NYSE: YEXT) to announce Q4 & FY 2025 results on March 5, 2025, with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT.
news.summary: Yext, Inc. (NYSE: YEXT) will be releasing their fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025 results on Wednesday, March 5, 2025, after the market closes. They are the top digital presence platform for multi-location brands. A conference call will be held at 5:00 p.m. (ET) / 2:00 p.m. (PT) on the same day to discuss the financial results with investors. The event will be live webcast on the Yext Investor Relations website at http.

news.headline: N-able (NYSE:NABL) to host 2025 Investor Day on March 13 in NYC, starting at 9 AM and finishing at 12 PM.
news.summary: N-able, Inc., a software company listed on the NYSE under the ticker NABL, is set to hold its 2025 Investor Day in New York City on March 13, 2025. The event, scheduled to commence at 9:00 a.m. ET and run until 12:00 p.m. ET, will showcase presentations from the company's management and include a live Q&A session. N-able specializes in aiding IT services providers with delivering security, data protection services, and unified endpoint management solutions globally. The Investor Day aims to offer insights into the company's strategic direction and growth opportunities.

news.headline: Host Hotels & Resorts updates Q4 2024 results in an investor presentation. Company is the largest lodging REIT in the US.
news.summary: Bethesda, Maryland - February 20, 2025 - Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the largest lodging real estate investment trust in the U.S., released an updated investor presentation detailing its fourth quarter 2024 performance. The presentation is available on the Company’s website in the Investor Relations section at https://www.hosthotels.com/#key-investors-materials.

news.headline: Glencore & Rio Tinto are considering leaving London Stock Exchange, Glencore exploring move to NYSE due to optimal valuation. Glencore has a market cap of £40 billion, reported $1.6 billion net loss for 2024.
news.summary: Two major mining companies, Glencore and Rio Tinto, are in discussions with the London Stock Exchange about their listings. Glencore, based in Switzerland, is considering a potential move to the New York Stock Exchange for better valuation opportunities. Glencore has been listed on the LSE since its $10 billion IPO in 2011 and currently holds a market capitalization of £40 billion ($50 billion), placing it among the top 20 most valuable listings. However, a recent financial report showing a $1.6 billion net loss for 2024 may prompt Glencore to seek a new exchange. Rio Tinto, on the other hand, is examining its listing arrangement with LSE for different reasons.

news.headline: Sam Bankman-Fried allies with Republican Party during clemency push to secure pardon from President Trump.
news.summary: Sam Bankman-Fried recently made comments regarding a plea for clemency in an attempt to obtain a pardon from President Donald Trump.

news.headline: Microsoft is increasing capacity to back up OpenAI’s GPT-4-5 and GPT-5 models for greater support.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that unemployment rates in the country have dropped to a record low of 3.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. This decrease corresponds to approximately 500,000 more individuals finding employment. The job market has shown strong growth, with various sectors contributing to the increase in jobs. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth rate of 2.5% in the last quarter, indicating a positive trend. Experts believe that these numbers reflect a healthy and robust economy, with the potential for further growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Con Edison reported 2024 net income of $1,820 million; adjusted earnings were $1,868 million. Q4 2024 net income was $310 million. Plans to make capital investments of $5,122 million in 2025 and up to $8,067 million in 2026. Expects adjusted earnings per share for 2025 to be $5.50 to $5.70. For the 2027-2029 period, plans to invest $24,469 million. Plans to issue $1,350 million of common equity in 2025, $1,850 million in 2026, and up to $4,300 million between 2027-2029.
news.summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. reported a 2024 net income for common stock of $1,820 million or $5.26 a share, down from $2,519 million or $7.25 a share in 2023. Adjusted earnings were $1,868 million or $5.40 a share in 2024, compared to $1,762 million or $5.07 a share in 2023. For Q4 of 2024, net income for common stock was $310 million or $0.90 a share, lower than the $335 million or $0.97 a share in 2023. The company expects adjusted earnings per share in 2025 to be $5.50 to $5.70. Con Edison also plans significant capital investments: $5,122 million in 2025, $8,067 million in 2026, and $24,469 million from 2027 to 2029. They will internally generate funds and issue long-term debt and common equity to meet these investment needs. The company provided forward-looking statements and non-GAAP financial measures to communicate expectations and financial performance. Con Edison's 2024 Annual Report and form 10-K filed with the SEC will provide further details.

news.headline: Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) shares sink after Q4 revenue miss, reporting earnings of 71 cents/share (missed 87 cents estimate) with revenue at $6.03B (missed $6.29B estimate). CEO Jack Dorsey aims to end year 'at rule of 40 run rate'.
news.summary: Shares of Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) have dropped following the release of the company's fourth-quarter results after market close on Thursday. The quarter saw earnings of 71 cents per share, falling short of the expected 87 cents per share as per analysts' consensus. Quarterly revenue stood at $6.03 billion, missing the consensus estimate of $6.29 billion. Despite the miss, this revenue figure shows growth from the same period last year, where revenue was $5.77 billion.

news.headline: Talkdesk recognized by G2's 2025 Best Software Awards for Best Customer Service Products, ranked #11 on the list.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Talkdesk has been recognized by G2's 2025 Best Software Awards for its exceptional performance in the field of customer service products. It secured the 11th position on the Best Customer Service Products list.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens Stonegate Court, a luxury home community in Gilbert, Arizona with 22 home sites and central park. Model home at 4229 South Quinn Avenue. Open by appointment.
news.summary: In Gilbert, Arizona, on February 20, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), a prominent builder of luxury homes, unveiled its latest development. Stonegate Court is a boutique gated community with 22 expansive home sites encircling a central park featuring a multi-sport pickleball and basketball court along with outdoor social areas. The construction of the first model home, the Markham Farmhouse, is in progress at 4229 South Quinn Avenue in Gilbert. Interested individuals can visit the community by scheduling an appointment.

news.headline: Trump’s rollback on clean energy policies may jeopardize a factory boom as support for low-carbon power diminishes.
news.summary: The decision by the current administration to withdraw support for low-carbon power sources has negatively impacted the market for wind, solar, and electric vehicle components. This shift is causing a decrease in the attractiveness of investing in these industries, potentially hindering their growth and profitability.

news.headline: Select Medical announces Q4 and year-end results for 2024, 2025 business outlook, and cash dividend declaration - Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: In Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania on February 20, 2025, Select Medical Holdings Corporation (NYSE: SEM) shared its financial performance for Q4 and the full year of 2024. The company also presented its business forecast for 2025 and disclosed their decision to pay out a cash dividend.

news.headline: Orange executed transactions for share buyback program, in addition to those outside a liquidity contract.
Mercado Libre's impressive Q4 2024: Net revenue at $6.1 billion, net income of $639 million.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Mercado Libre achieved impressive financial results, reporting a net revenue of $6.1 billion and a net income of $639 million. The company's performance in this period was described as stellar, showcasing its strong performance and profitability. These figures underline Mercado Libre's continued success and growth in the market.

news.headline: Illumin Holdings Inc. to report Q4 and year-end 2024 results on March 14, 2025. (TSX: ILLM, OTCQB:ILLMF)
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, illumin Holdings Inc. (TSX: ILLM, OTCQB: ILLMF) shared that it will release its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 on March 14, 2025, before the market opens. illumin, a digital advertising technology leader, assists marketers in making informed choices regarding engaging with online customers. This update was not highlighted by any specific source.

news.headline: Embraer offers cash tender for senior notes due 2028, up to $150 million to be considered in offer.
news.summary: In São Paulo on February 20, 2025, Embraer S.A. discloses details regarding the Tender Offer to buy back bonds up to the Maximum Principal Amount of US$150,000,000, as previously revealed. This offer involves payment of consideration for the purchased bonds.

news.headline: Alpha Capital Anstalt warns of scam as third parties falsely claim association and offer investment funding.
news.summary: In Vaduz, Liechtenstein on February 20, 2025, Alpha Capital Anstalt has reported a scam involving individuals falsely posing as employees or agents of the company. These scammers are reaching out to individuals and corporate entities, offering investment funding under the guise of representing Alpha Capital Anstalt. It is important to note that the scam involves third parties making unauthorized claims on behalf of the company.

news.headline: Excelerate Energy (NYSE: EE) declares $0.06 quarterly cash dividend per share. Payable on Mar 27 to Class A stockholders as of Mar 12, '25.
news.summary: Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE) based in The Woodlands, Texas, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per share of Class A common stock for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. The dividend will be disbursed on March 27, 2025, to Class A common stockholders listed as of March 12, 2025. This decision comes as Excelerate Energy's ongoing effort to reward its investors.

news.headline: Ross Stores CFO Adam Orvos, 60, will retire on Sept 30, 2025. William Sheehan, 56, to take over as CFO on Oct 1, 2025, with 34 years of experience.
news.summary: Dublin, California - Retail giant Ross Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROST) shared the news of the upcoming retirement of Adam Orvos (60), who serves as the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Orvos is set to step down on September 30, 2025. William Sheehan (56), the current Group Senior Vice President of Finance, has been promoted to the role of Deputy Chief Financial Officer. It is anticipated that Sheehan, with over 34 years of extensive financial expertise in the retail sector, will assume the position of Chief Financial Officer on October 1, 2025.

news.headline: IFF announces changes to exec team aligned with new operating model. Simon Herriott steps down after 21 years. Leticia Gonçalves to join as new president of Health and Biosciences.
news.summary: In New York, IFF (NYSE: IFF) has made changes to its executive leadership team in tandem with the Company's external reporting structure. After 21 years at IFF, Simon Herriott, the current president of Health and Biosciences, will be stepping down. Taking over this role from March 1 is Leticia Gonçalves, who is currently serving as ADM’s president of precision fermentation and ADM Ventures. During his tenure starting from 2019, Simon has been instrumental in fostering growth and operational efficiency through innovation.

news.headline: Ecolab appoints Michel Doukeris, CEO of AB InBev, to board of directors, effective Feb 20, 2025. Strong addition.
news.summary: In St. Paul, Minnesota, the board of directors of Ecolab Inc. has named Michel Doukeris, current Chief Executive Officer of AB InBev, as an independent director on the Ecolab board. The appointment is set to commence on February 20, 2025. Christophe Beck, the Chairman of Ecolab, expressed enthusiasm about this addition, highlighting Doukeris' expertise gained from leading a prominent global company. Beck emphasized Doukeris' profound industry knowledge, especially in areas like complex operations, successful product branding, and achieving success in consumer markets. This strategic move aims to leverage Doukeris' experience to further enhance Ecolab's board of directors.

news.headline: Celsius Holdings (Nasdaq: CELH) reports 4Q 2024 revenue of $332.2M, down 4% from last year, with $1.35B revenue for FY 2024.
news.summary: Celsius Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CELH) based in Boca Raton, Florida, shared its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company reported revenue of $332.2 million compared to $347.4 million in the same period in 2023, marking a 4% decrease. For the full year of 2024, revenue was $1,355.6 million, showing a 3% increase from $1,318.0 million in 2023. Revenue in North America for the fourth quarter of 2024 was $311.9 million, down 6% from $332.8 million in 2023. For the full year, North American revenue totaled $1,280.9 million, a 1% increase from $1,263.3 million in 2023. International revenue in the fourth quarter amounted to $20.3 million, up 39% from $14.6 million in the fourth quarter of 2023. For the full year of 2024, international revenue was $74.7 million, a 37% increase from $54.7 million in 2023. The gross margin for the specified period was not provided in the excerpt.

news.headline: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) receives ratings upgrade from Fitch Ratings to 'BBB-', indicating a Stable Rating Outlook.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Levi Strauss & Co. (LS&Co.) (NYSE: LEVI) revealed that Fitch Ratings has raised its Long-Term Issuer Default Rating (IDR) to 'BBB-' from 'BB+'. This move signifies an investment grade rating, signaling stability to the market. LS&Co.'s Chief Financial and Growth Officer, Harmit Singh, highlighted that the upgrade showcases their dedication to financial prudence amidst pursuing strategic expansion in various areas. This update suggests positive prospects for LS&Co., emphasizing its strong financial position and growth strategies.

news.headline: Rivian Automotive surpasses Q4 revenue estimate with $1.73 billion and beats EPS at a loss of 46 cents per share.
news.summary: Rivian Automotive, an electric vehicle manufacturer, revealed its fourth-quarter financial performance post-market close on Thursday. The company reported Q4 revenue of $1.73 billion, surpassing the Street consensus of $1.4 billion from Benzinga Pro data. This revenue, a quarterly high, saw growth in software and services revenue as well as an increase in the average selling price of R1 vehicles. Despite expectations of a loss of 65 cents per share, the company reported an adjusted loss of 46 cents per share. Rivian saw a gross profit of $170 million in the same period. Additionally, it finalized a joint venture with Volkswagen Group with a deal size of up to $5.8 billion. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Coeur Mining's CEO to speak at BMO Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conf. in Feb 25, 2025, 7am CT. (NYSE: CDE)
news.summary: Coeur Mining, Inc.’s Chairman, President, and CEO Mitchell J. Krebs is scheduled to speak at the BMO Capital Markets Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conference in Hollywood, Florida on February 25, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. CT (8:00 a.m. ET). This conference is exclusive to invited investors. The event will feature discussions on industry trends and key insights. Krebs will deliver a presentation highlighting Coeur's strategies and outlook for the future. The company's stock trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CDE.

news.headline: indie Semiconductor's Q4 revenue up 7.5% to $58.0M, Non-GAAP gross margin flat at 50.4%. GAAP operating loss at $33.9M.
news.summary: Indie Semiconductor, Inc., a leader in automotive solutions, has just released its fourth quarter results for the period ending December 31, 2024. In this period, the company reported a 7.5% increase in revenue, reaching $58.0 million. The Non-GAAP gross margin remained steady at 50.4%. However, on a GAAP basis, the operating loss for the fourth quarter of 2024 was $33.9 million, compared to $21.6 million in the previous year. The Non-GAAP operating loss for the same period was not fully disclosed.

news.headline: Ingram Micro enhances Trust X Alliance community, highlighting customers' global reach and influence.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Ingram Micro's enhanced Trust X Alliance network is emphasizing the increasing impact, worth, and input of its customers on a global scale.

news.headline: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. declares $0.21 per share dividend for second quarter 2025. Board of Directors approved.
news.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a leading global provider of innovative solutions for injectable drug delivery, has recently declared a dividend of $0.21 per share for the second quarter of 2025. The company's Board of Directors approved this decision, showcasing their commitment to providing returns to shareholders. This news was announced on February 20, 2025, from Exton, Pennsylvania. West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol WST.

news.headline: Elastic to present at Morgan Stanley conference on March 5, 2025, at 1:05 p.m. PT / 4:05 p.m. ET. (NYSE: ESTC)  Live webcast and replay available on ir.elastic.co.
news.summary: SAN FRANCISCO--Elastic, known as the Search AI Company and listed on NYSE as ESTC, disclosed that its executives will be speaking at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 5, 2025, at 1:05 p.m. PT / 4:05 p.m. ET. Those interested can watch a live webcast or the event replay on Elastic’s Investor Relations site at ir.elastic.co. Elastic focuses on offering real-time data solutions to assist individuals in finding the information they require, utilizing all available data sources.

news.headline: Xenia Hotels & Resorts sets annual stockholders meeting on May 13, 2025 in Orlando, Florida (NYSE: XHR).
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on February 20, 2025, Xenia Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NYSE: XHR) disclosed that their 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders is set for Tuesday, May 13, 2025. Mark your calendars for this important event where decisions will be made regarding the company's future.

news.headline: L3Harris begins construction on 4 solid rocket motor facilities in Arkansas, part of $215.6M agreement with Defense Dept.
news.summary: In Camden, Arkansas, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has initiated the construction of four new solid rocket motor production facilities at its Camden site. The groundbreaking ceremony was attended by Department of Defense officials, industry customers, and state and local dignitaries. This expansion project is a result of a $215.6 million cooperative agreement between the Defense Department’s Defense Production Act Title III program and L3Harris. The aim of this initiative is to boost domestic rocket propulsion manufacturing capabilities.

news.headline: FMC Corp CEO and CFO to speak at Bank of America 2025 Global Agri & Materials Conf. Pierre Brondeau & Andrew Sandifer to attend.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on February 20, 2025, FMC Corporation revealed that Pierre Brondeau, FMC's chairman and CEO, along with Andrew Sandifer, the company's CFO, are scheduled to address audiences at the Bank of America 2025 Global Agriculture event. FMC Corporation, listed on the NYSE as FMC, continues to make significant strides in the agriculture sector. The insights shared by Brondeau and Sandifer at this event are eagerly anticipated by investors and industry experts alike.

news.headline: FMS 2025 in Santa Clara opens call for presentations, seeking expert speakers for the memory and storage event.
news.summary: A prestigious conference solely focused on memory and storage solutions, FMS: the Future of Memory and Storage, is currently accepting applications from expert speakers for its upcoming 2025 event in Santa Clara, California, which is scheduled to take place on February 20th. This sought-after annual conference aims to gather industry leaders, researchers, and specialists to share insights and innovations in the field of memory and storage. The event is known for its high-quality presentations and informative panels which attract a large audience. Submitting a presentation or panel proposal for this industry-leading event can provide professionals with an opportunity to showcase their expertise to a wide audience and contribute to the advancement of the memory and storage sector. If interested, experts can apply to speak at this highly anticipated conference, as it promises to be a prominent platform for networking and exchanging ideas related to the future of memory and storage technologies.

news.headline: Nauticus Robotics (NASDAQ: KITT) complies with Nasdaq standards on Feb. 18, 2025 after receiving notice.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Nauticus Robotics, Inc. (NASDAQ: KITT), a top player in autonomous subsea robotics and software, was officially notified by The Nasdaq Capital Market ("Nasdaq") regarding a significant update. The notice signifies a noteworthy development for Nauticus.

news.headline: Edward J. Wehmer announces retirement from Stepan Company board of directors in April 2025.
news.summary: A corporate update from Northbrook, Illinois on February 20, 2025 revealed that Stepan Company (NYSE: SCL) shared news of Edward J. Wehmer's retirement from the Board of Directors. Wehmer will officially step down during the Company's upcoming annual meeting of stockholders in April...

news.headline: Education advocacy group, Wake Up Call NJ, launches multi-million dollar ad campaign to improve New Jersey schools.
news.summary: A multimillion-dollar ad campaign has been launched in New Jersey by Wake Up Call NJ, a non-partisan, nonprofit educational advocacy organization established by Laura Overdeck and Peter Shulman. The initiative aims to raise awareness and promote educational advocacy in the state. The campaign, initiated on February 20, 2025, is focused on reaching a wide audience across New Jersey.

news.headline: Celsius Holdings to acquire Alani Nu for $1.8 billion, creating leading functional lifestyle platform in U.S. energy drink category.
news.summary: Celsius Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CELH) based in Boca Raton, Florida, has shared news of its acquisition agreement with Alani Nutrition LLC in Louisville, Kentucky. The deal is valued at $1.8 billion, with $150 million in tax assets included. The net purchase price stands at $1.65 billion, to be paid using a combination of cash and stock. This move will merge the two expanding brands in the energy drink sector within the United States. This consolidation aims to establish a prominent position in the better-for-you, functional drink market segment.

news.headline: Macy’s, Inc. will announce Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 6, 2025.
news.summary: Macy’s, Inc. is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on March 6, 2025, in New York. The report will provide critical insights into the company's performance during the specified periods, including key figures such as revenue, profit, and potentially market trends. Investors, stakeholders, and analysts await this disclosure to assess the company's financial health and strategic direction moving forward.

news.headline: Renasant Corp. (NYSE: RNST) declares $0.22/share quarterly dividend, payment on March 31, 2025, to shareholders as of March 17.
news.summary: In Tupelo, Mississippi on February 20, 2025, the board of directors of Renasant Corporation (NYSE: RNST) has given the green light for a quarterly cash dividend of twenty-two cents ($0.22) per share. This dividend is set to be disbursed on March 31, 2025, specifically to shareholders listed as of March 17, 2025.

news.headline: Oaktree Specialty Lending Corp. prices $300M 6.340% Notes due 2030 in public offering. Notes may be redeemed early.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Oaktree Specialty Lending Corporation (NASDAQ: OCSL) revealed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. The offering consists of $300.0 million aggregate principal amount of 6.340% notes set to mature on February 27, 2030. These notes come with the option for the Company to redeem them in full or partially at par along with a “make-whole” premium, as deemed necessary.

news.headline: BioAge Labs will participate in TD Cowen's 45th Annual Health Care Conference on Feb. 20, 2025. Nasdaq: BIOA.
news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company called BioAge Labs, listed as BIOA on Nasdaq, based in Richmond, California, is in the clinical stage of development for therapeutic products targeting metabolic diseases by focusing on human aging biology. They have revealed plans to engage in individual meetings at TD Cowen's 45th Annual Health Care Conference. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025.
